name: From Skyline (and Back)
description:
“We died before we should.”

[ fix your friendship ]

.

—

Some friendships crumble under the fiction of others. Where love was never the problem, but everyone else insisted it had to be. A quiet tragedy about losing what was perfect, just because everyone believed it would’ve been perfect if it had been anything other than platonic. But even after the end, something stays. Maybe even returns. To a friend that cherishes friendship above all else, he only hopes that you understand.
